text: Walking through this bright, modern corridor, I feel a sense of anticipation. Glass and light dominate the space, and as I approach the R+D exhibit behind the glass, I am struck by curiosity. The exhibit's wall invites contemplation about research, development, and how humans interact with technology. I feel a quiet eagerness to learn, yet slightly distanced by the clinical, orderly arrangement. The focus on progress and innovation sparks questions within me about the direction of our collective journey and my own relationship with discovery.
